title: Oliveboard Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Oliveboard Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Oliveboard Holdings Services family as a Subject Matter Expert in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Oliveboard Holdings Services:
Oliveboard Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard Holdings Services!
